S.FORM: == satangahan : == abala u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :Ťā©ŤÜÄ nu Amilika :shoulder nu Zipun :Ťā© u canan ku abala(abalaśėĮšĽÄťļľ?)ňź namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ňź == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ňź ==
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan : == abar~…ĺa u zuma a kamu : nu ńßur~…ĺam :** nu amir~…ĺika :sńßour~…ĺd…ôr nu zipun :* u ¶anan ku abar~…ĺa(abar~…ĺa***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan * == mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan * ==
S.FORM: == satangahan : == abala u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :Ťā©ŤÜÄ nu Amilika :shoulder nu Zipun :Ťā© u canan ku abala(abalaśėĮšĽÄťļľ?)ňź namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ňź == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ňź ==
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan : == abar~…ĺa u zuma a kamu : nu ńßur~…ĺam :** nu amir~…ĺika :sńßour~…ĺd…ôr nu zipun :* u ¶anan ku abar~…ĺa(abar~…ĺa***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan * == mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan * ==
